summary: Frontend-only testing of Pi GPU crash fix (opacity animation, hub-and-spoke map). All key features verified via browser automation.
critical_code_review_comments: MapEmbed.jsx: Hub-and-spoke (SPOKES) correctly uses opacity animation with willChange='opacity' — GPU composited, no CPU repaint. Good.
NetworkMap.jsx: Full mesh kept but only backbone lines (Novi/Azure) animate; non-backbone static. MESH_PAIRS name is gone (now MESH_LINKS). No undefined references.
No stroke-dashoffset keyframes found anywhere — old CPU-heavy animation completely removed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Pi GPU crash fixes verified. Dashboard hub-and-spoke map renders Novi as central hub with 8 spokes. NetworkMap full mesh renders with all 9 site diamonds. WUG tab shows demo 5-location topology (27 devices). KPI cards, DIA Circuit Status Engine, Vendor Health Matrix, Incident Queue all populated. Zero JS console errors. Tabs all navigate cleanly.

verified_features.dashboard_hub_spoke_map: PASS - Novi as hub, 8 spokes visible (Remus, Mt.Pleasant, Ovid, Constantine, Canton, Canton Warehouse, Middlebury, Azure)
verified_features.kpi_cards: PASS - System Alerts=0, Network Availability=100.0%, External Services=21/21, Response Queue=0
verified_features.network_map_full_mesh: PASS - All 9 site diamonds visible, full mesh lines rendered, backbone lines brighter
verified_features.dia_circuit_status_engine: PASS - All sites shown with colored badges (Remus, Ovid, Mt.Pleasant, Constantine, Novi, Canton, Canton Warehouse, Middlebury)
verified_features.vendor_health_matrix: PASS - CrowdStrike, NinjaOne, Zscaler, Keeper, Mimecast, Cloudflare, Microsoft, Dynamics, Outlook, RocketMSP, OpenAI, Google, Claude, AWS, Google, Unifi tiles all green
verified_features.incident_queue: PASS - Tickets from Vivantio showing (Re: D365 Cases, Additional Approval Needed, FW: Remus Remote Access)
verified_features.no_mesh_pairs_errors: PASS - 0 JS console errors, no MESH_PAIRS references, no stroke-dashoffset keyframes
verified_features.tabs_navigation: PASS - All tabs (Dashboard, Network Map, WUG) navigate without blank screens
verified_features.wug_tab: PASS - Demo topology for 5 locations (Novi HQ, Remus, Mt.Pleasant, Constantine, Canton), 27 devices monitored
